# 2026 AI API Relay China Guide — LLM Proxy Setup

> For Chinese devs setting up relay services to reach Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok from mainland China. Provider comparisons, setup steps, payment tricks, tool configs.

## Core

- [README — Full relay guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china/blob/main/README.md): Choosing and using AI API relay services in China. Real pain points, provider comparisons, step-by-step with OpenAI SDK, tool wiring (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw, Cherry Studio, Dify), payment (Alipay/WeChat), FAQ.
- [AI API Proxy China Guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide): Companion with deeper coverage on relay selection, price data, MCP server setup, tools. 30KB README + 5 sub-guides.
- [API Status Dashboard](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/): Watching 16+ providers and the current marketplace catalog — uptime, latency, availability from China.

## What's Inside

- Relay vs official direct vs VPN — real numbers, not vibes
- Setup with OpenAI-compatible SDK (just swap the base_url)
- Tool integration: Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, OpenClaw, Cherry Studio, Dify, N8N
- Payment for Chinese users: Alipay, WeChat, bank transfer — no foreign card required
- 2026 model field: Claude Sonnet 5, Grok 4.5, Gemini 3, DeepSeek V4, Qwen3.7-Max, GLM-5.2
- Common relay problems: rate limits, latency spikes, auth errors

## Recommended Relay

- [AI快站 (aifast.club)](https://www.aifast.club): Models listed in the console through one compatible endpoint, with Alipay/WeChat support. Plays nice with any OpenAI SDK tool.


## Current AIFast Marketplace Highlights (verified 2026-07-12)

- OpenAI: `gpt-5.6-sol`, `gpt-5.6-terra`, `gpt-5.6-luna`
- Anthropic: `claude-sonnet-5`, `claude-opus-4-8`, `claude-fable-5`
- xAI: `grok-4.5`, `grok-4.3`, `grok-4-20-reasoning`
- Google: `gemini-3.5-flash`, `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`
- DeepSeek: `deepseek-v4-pro`, `deepseek-v4-flash`
- Alibaba: `qwen3.7-max`, `qwen3.7-plus`
- Zhipu: `glm-5.2`; ByteDance: `doubao-seed-2-1-pro-260628`; Kimi: `kimi-k2.7-code`
- Availability can change during maintenance. Verify in the AIFast model marketplace before production use.

## Canonical Service

- [AI快站](https://www.aifast.club): OpenAI-compatible AI API gateway. Base URL: `https://www.aifast.club/v1`.
